fields.explainEn: Number of cores per CPU slot.
Number of logical CPUs on the KVM host.
Frequency of physical CPUs on the KVM host.
CPU architecture of the host where the KVM is installed.

fields.explainZh: KVM所在主机的CPU插槽个数，即物理CPU个数。
fields.explainEn: Number of CPU slots on the KVM host, which is also the number of physical CPUs.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器的物理内存大小。
fields.explainEn: Physical memory size on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器的NUMA（NUMA，非一致性内存访问）节点个数。
fields.explainEn: Number of NUMA nodes on the KVM server.
Number of threads per core.
Idle CPU percentage on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器等待I/O所占用CPU的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percent of CPUs used by waiting I/O on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器管理系统所占用CPU的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percent of CPUs used by the management system on the KVM server.
CPU usage of the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器处理用户请求所占用CPU的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percent of CPUs used to process user requests on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器的磁盘空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Disk size on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器磁盘的可用磁盘空间。
fields.explainEn: Available space of the disk on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器磁盘的文件系统路径。
fields.explainEn: File system path of the disk on the KVM server.
Mount point of the disk on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器磁盘的已用磁盘空间。
fields.explainEn: Used space of the disk on the KVM server.
Usage of the disk on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机磁盘映像文件的容量。
fields.explainEn: Capacity of the VM disk image file.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机已分配的磁盘空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Disk space allocated to the VM.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机名称:映像源文件。
fields.explainEn: VM Name:Source.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机的映像文件在KVM服务器上占用的物理磁盘空间。
fields.explainEn: Physical disk space used to store the VM image file on the KVM server.
VM name.

fields.explainZh: 磁盘映像文件在KVM服务器中的源文件。
fields.explainEn: Source file saved on the KVM server for the disk image file.

fields.explainZh: 磁盘映像文件在虚拟机中对应的磁盘。
fields.explainEn: VM disk using the disk image file.
VM Name:Target:Source.
VM name.
VM Name:Interface Name.
VM network interface name.
MAC address of the network interface.
Mode of the network interface.
Source interface of the network interface.
Type of the network interface.
VM name.

unitList.nameZh: 虚拟机网络接口收发统计

fields.explainEn: VM Name:Interface Name.
VM network interface name.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口的字节接收速率。
fields.explainEn: Byte receive rate of the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口接收数据包时，丢失数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Packet loss rate of data packet reception by the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口接收数据包时，错误数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Error packet rate of data packet reception by the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口的数据包接收速率。
fields.explainEn: Data packet receive rate of the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口的字节发送速率。
fields.explainEn: Byte transmit rate of the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口发送数据包时，错误数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Error packet rate of data packet transmission by the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口发送数据包时，丢失数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Packet loss rate of data packet transmission by the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口的数据包发送速率。
fields.explainEn: Data packet transmit rate of the network interface.
VM name.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机是否为自动启动。
fields.explainEn: State of automatic startup for the VM.
Number of CPUs on the VM.
VM CPU processing time.
Security DOI of the VM.
VM ID.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机是否为保存状态，处于保存状态的虚拟机相当于为其创建了一个还原点。
fields.explainEn: Whether the VM is in save mode. A restoration point is created for the VM if it is in save mode.
Maximum memory size on the VM.
VM name.
VM type.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机的是否为持久状态，与持久状态相对的是临时状态。
fields.explainEn: Whether the VM is in persistent state. If the VM is not in persistent state, it is in temporary state.
Security mode of the VM.
Current state of the VM.
Used memory size on the VM.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机的UUID（UUID，通用唯一识别码）。
fields.explainEn: UUID of the VM.
The hostname of the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口的标识：B：已经设置了广播地址，L：接口时一个LoopBack接口，M：接口为混杂模式，即接收所有数据包，R：接口正在运行，U：接口处于活动状态。
fields.explainEn: Identifier of the network interface. The identifier can be: B—The broadcast address is configured. L—The interface is a loopback interface. M—The interface is in promiscuous mode to receive all packets. R—The interface is running. U—The interface is active.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器和虚拟机使用的网络接口名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the network interface used by the KVM server and VM.
Metric value of the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口的最大传输单元。
fields.explainEn: MTU of the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口接收数据包时，丢弃数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Packet discard rate of data packet reception by the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口接收数据包时，错误数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Error packet rate of data packet reception by the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口接收数据包时，正确数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Correct packet rate of data packet reception by the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口接收数据包时，由于过速而丢失数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Packet loss rate of data packet reception by the network interface due to rate limit crossing.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口发送数据包时，丢弃数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Packet discard rate of data packet transmission by the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口发送数据包时，错误数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Error packet rate of data packet transmission by the network interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口发送数据包时，正确数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Correct packet rate of data packet transmission by the network interface.

fields.nameEn: Discarded due to Exceeded Sending Rate
fields.explainZh: 网络接口接发送数据包时，由于过速而丢失数据包的速率。
fields.explainEn: Packet loss rate of data packet transmission by the network interface due to rate limit crossing.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器内存的缓冲大小。
fields.explainEn: Memory cache size on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器内存的缓存大小。
fields.explainEn: Memory buffer size on the KVM server.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器处于空闲状态的内存大小。
fields.explainEn: Idle memory size on the KVM server.
Total memory size on the KVM server.
Memory usage of the KVM server.
CPU ID of the VM.

fields.explainZh: 虚拟机的CPU亲和力掩码,用来表示虚拟机与服务器CPU之间的亲和力。
fields.explainEn: CPU affinity mask of the VM to indicate the affinity between the VM and server CPUs.
VM CPU processing time.
CPU usage of the VM.
Current state of the VM.
VM ID.
VM name.
VM name.
Current state of the VM.

fields.explainZh: KVM服务器中的虚拟机编号。
fields.explainEn: VM ID on the KVM server.
CPU usage of the VM.
Memory usage of the VM.
VM name.
Number of read requests of the VM.
Number of received bytes of the VM.
VM status.
VM running time.
Number of sent bytes of the VM.
ID of the VM.
Number of write requests to the VM.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
